action.reasoning: Observation: Current best IC 0.057898 from two-model ensemble (DART+GBDT). 10-model ensemble dropped IC to 0.055748 but increased rank_IC to 0.0611. Analysis: Ensemble averaging reduced ic_mean. Need a model that directly optimizes ranking while maintaining Pearson IC. CatBoost with YetiRank objective directly optimizes pairwise ranking using group information and can handle continuous labels; it often yields strong IC in Qlib benchmarks. Decision: Train a single CatBoost model with YetiRank on standardized daily returns, using day groups. Update predict.py to load CatBoost model. Submit eval to measure improvement. Remaining time ~1.12h, training should take <20 min.
